name: beehiiv-subscribe
description: Subscribe or reactivate an email address on a Beehiiv publication. Supports UTM attribution, custom fields, tier assignment, and automation enrollment.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Beehiiv API key (e.g. 'beehiiv/api_key'). Create API keys at https://app.beehiiv.com/settings/integrations.

PUBLICATION_ID.description: Beehiiv publication ID (e.g. 'pub_xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'). Supports {{key}} template interpolation from upstream node output.

EMAIL.description: Email address to subscribe. Supports {{key}} template interpolation (e.g. '{{email}}' to pull from upstream node output).

REACTIVATE_EXISTING.description: When true, resubscribes a previously unsubscribed email. When false (default), returns the existing subscription without modification.

SEND_WELCOME_EMAIL.description: When true, sends the publication's configured welcome email to the new subscriber.

DOUBLE_OPT_OVERRIDE.description: 'on' requires the subscriber to confirm via email before activating. 'off' activates immediately regardless of publication settings. 'not_set' uses the publication's default double opt-in setting.

TIER.description: Subscription tier to assign. Leave unset to use the publication default (free).

UTM_SOURCE.description: Acquisition source for analytics (e.g. 'talos-workflow'). Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

UTM_MEDIUM.description: Acquisition medium for analytics (e.g. 'automation'). Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

UTM_CAMPAIGN.description: Acquisition campaign name. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

UTM_TERM.description: Acquisition search term. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

UTM_CONTENT.description: Acquisition content variant (for A/B testing). Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

REFERRING_SITE.description: Website URL the subscriber was referred from. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

REFERRAL_CODE.description: Referral code of the referring subscriber. Grants referral credit to the referrer.

CUSTOM_FIELDS.description: Custom fields to set on this subscription. Provide as a JSON array of {name, value} objects (e.g. '[{"name":"first_name","value":"Alice"}]') or a JSON array value. Custom fields must already exist in the publication.

AUTOMATION_IDS.description: Comma-separated list of automation IDs to enroll the subscriber in. Each automation must have an active 'Add by API' trigger.

setup_instructions.title: Create a Beehiiv API key
setup_instructions.detail: Log in to https://app.beehiiv.com, navigate to Settings > Integrations > API, and create a new API key. Copy the key — it is only shown once.

setup_instructions.title: Store the API key as a Talos secret
setup_instructions.detail: Use set_secret with key_path='beehiiv/api_key' and value='<your-api-key>'.

setup_instructions.title: Find your Publication ID
setup_instructions.detail: Call the Beehiiv API: GET https://api.beehiiv.com/v2/publications (with Authorization: Bearer <key>). Copy the 'id' field (format: pub_xxx...) from the publication you want to use.

setup_instructions.title: Configure the node
setup_instructions.detail: Set API_KEY_SECRET to 'beehiiv/api_key', PUBLICATION_ID to your pub_xxx... ID, and EMAIL to the subscriber's email address (or a {{template}} reference to an upstream node's output).
